name: prochat-memory-qa-public-snapshot
description: Source-available beta snapshot for ProChat Memory for QA: local QA investigation memory for recurring test failures.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @prochat/memory-core && npm run build --workspace @prochat/memory-cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @prochat/memory-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @prochat/memory-cli
